description: The Giuliano clan is a powerful Neapolitan Camorra clan originating in the Forcella district of Naples. Founded by Pio Vittorio Giuliano in the early 1950s, it initially focused on cigarette smuggling. Under Luigi Giuliano, it became the most powerful Camorra group in Naples from the 1970s to the mid-1980s. The clan was a key member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance that defeated the Nuova Camorra Organizzata. As of 2025, only a small faction remains active.
